title: Aim 2 — Variable Creation
text:
This file builds every analysis variable specified in the Aim 2 Statistical Analysis Plan (Tianqi_SAP.docx) from two data sources and writes one row per participant (aim2_master.rds) for the downstream Table 1 / analysis files.
Variables are grouped by data source:

REDCap — the longitudinal study database (demographics, comorbidities, kidney function, ICI regimen, concomitant medications).
RPDR — the hospital laboratory pull (baseline hemoglobin and albumin).

Each table below lists the variable, its type, and its definition. The R code that creates it is hidden — click ► Code to expand any block.

REDCap is longitudinal. The export has one row per (record_id × redcap_event_name); each variable is pulled from its event, then joined back to one row per record_id:



Event (redcap_event_name)
Variables sourced here




prebaseline_arm_1
demographics, comorbidities, concomitant meds


baseline_arm_1
egfr, baseline visit_date, EMPI


early_treatment_we_arm_1
ici_type (baseline ICI regimen)






Code
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(lubridate)




Code
# --- FILL IN once the Aim 2 data arrives (logic below is fully SAP-specified) ---
redcap_path   <- "Data/AIM2_REDCAP_DATA.csv"   # longitudinal REDCap export
rpdr_lab_path <- "Data/AIM2_RPDR_Lab.txt"       # RPDR lab pull (pipe-delimited), keyed by EMPI
HGB_GROUP     <- "HGB"   # hemoglobin Group_Id in the RPDR pull
ALB_GROUP     <- "ALB"   # albumin   Group_Id in the RPDR pull




Code
raw <- read_csv(redcap_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
stopifnot("redcap_event_name" %in% names(raw))

prebaseline <- raw %>% filter(redcap_event_name == "prebaseline_arm_1")
baseline    <- raw %>% filter(redcap_event_name == "baseline_arm_1")
early_tx    <- raw %>% filter(redcap_event_name == "early_treatment_we_arm_1")

# Helper: OR across one or more 0/1 checkbox columns → 0/1 (NA treated as 0)
any_box <- function(df, cols) {
  as.integer(rowSums(across(all_of(cols), ~ replace_na(.x == 1, FALSE))) > 0)
}



REDCap








Variable
Type
Definition (REDCap source fields)




sex, race, ethnicity, study_arm
factor
REDCap sex, race, ethnicity, study_arm (pre-baseline), labelled as factors


cirrhosis
0/1
REDCap comorb_gi___9


asvcd
0/1
REDCap comorb_cardiac___1 OR comorb_neuro___3


chf
0/1
REDCap comorb_cardiac___5


hypertension
0/1
REDCap comorb_cardiac___4


copd
0/1
REDCap comorb_pulm___2


diabetes
0/1
REDCap comorb_endocrine___3 OR comorb_endocrine___4


autoimmune_history
0/1
1 if any of 18 REDCap boxes checked: comorb_rheum___1, comorb_rheum___3, comorb_pulm___3, comorb_cardiac___6, comorb_gi___1, comorb_gi___3, comorb_gi___4, comorb_gi___5, comorb_gi___8, comorb_derm___1, comorb_derm___2, comorb_derm___3, comorb_derm___4, comorb_neuro___1, comorb_neuro___2, comorb_endocrine___2, comorb_endocrine___3, comorb_heme___1


baseline_egfr
continuous
REDCap egfr at baseline event (mL/min/1.73 m²)


baseline_ckd_stage
factor G1–G5
KDIGO GFR categories of REDCap egfr


baseline_ckd_binary
0/1
1 if REDCap egfr <60 (G3a–G5)


baseline_ici_treatment
factor (11)
REDCap ici_type at early-treatment event


ici_regimen_class
factor (4)
mechanism class of REDCap ici_type


ppi, antibiotic, tmp_smx, nsaid, allopurinol, antiepileptic
0/1
structured REDCap field — ppi, nephrotox_drugs___1 (antibiotic), ___2 (tmp_smx), ___3 (nsaid), ___4 (allopurinol), ___5 (antiepileptic) — OR a con_med free-text match


AIN_con_med_any
0/1
1 if any of the six medication classes above is present





Code
# Demographics — numeric REDCap codes labelled as factors for Table 1.
demographics <- prebaseline %>%
  transmute(
    record_id,
    sex = factor(sex, levels = c(1, 2, 3),
                 labels = c("Male", "Female", "Other")),
    race = factor(race, levels = c(1, 2, 3, 4),
                  labels = c("White", "Black", "Asian", "Other")),
    ethnicity = factor(ethnicity, levels = c(1, 2),
                       labels = c("Hispanic", "Non-Hispanic")),
    study_arm = factor(
      study_arm, levels = c(1, 2, 3),
      labels = c("Metastatic melanoma + ICI",
                 "Adjuvant stage II–III melanoma + ICI",
                 "Control stage I–IIIA melanoma, no ICI"))
  )




Code
# Binary / composite comorbidities (0 = Absent, 1 = Present).
comorbidities <- prebaseline %>%
  transmute(
    record_id,
    cirrhosis    = any_box(prebaseline, "comorb_gi___9"),
    asvcd        = any_box(prebaseline, c("comorb_cardiac___1", "comorb_neuro___3")),
    chf          = any_box(prebaseline, "comorb_cardiac___5"),
    hypertension = any_box(prebaseline, "comorb_cardiac___4"),
    copd         = any_box(prebaseline, "comorb_pulm___2"),
    diabetes     = any_box(prebaseline, c("comorb_endocrine___3", "comorb_endocrine___4"))
  )




Code
# autoimmune_history = 1 if ANY pre-existing autoimmune comorbidity box is checked.
autoimmune_boxes <- c(
  "comorb_rheum___1", "comorb_rheum___3",
  "comorb_pulm___3",
  "comorb_cardiac___6",
  "comorb_gi___1", "comorb_gi___3", "comorb_gi___4", "comorb_gi___5", "comorb_gi___8",
  "comorb_derm___1", "comorb_derm___2", "comorb_derm___3", "comorb_derm___4",
  "comorb_neuro___1", "comorb_neuro___2",
  "comorb_endocrine___2", "comorb_endocrine___3",
  "comorb_heme___1"
)

autoimmune <- prebaseline %>%
  transmute(record_id,
            autoimmune_history = any_box(prebaseline, autoimmune_boxes))




Code
# Baseline kidney function: egfr at baseline event → KDIGO stage + <60 binary.
# KDIGO bands are inclusive at the top (G2 = 60–89, G1 ≥90); right = FALSE
# with these breaks reproduces that: <15 G5 · 15–29 G4 · 30–44 G3b ·
# 45–59 G3a · 60–89 G2 · ≥90 G1.
kidney <- baseline %>%
  transmute(
    record_id,
    baseline_egfr = as.numeric(egfr),
    baseline_ckd_stage = cut(
      baseline_egfr,
      breaks = c(-Inf, 15, 30, 45, 60, 90, Inf),
      labels = c("G5", "G4", "G3b", "G3a", "G2", "G1"),
      right  = FALSE),
    baseline_ckd_binary = if_else(baseline_egfr < 60, 1L, 0L)  # 1 = G3a–G5
  ) %>%
  mutate(baseline_ckd_stage = factor(
    baseline_ckd_stage, levels = c("G1", "G2", "G3a", "G3b", "G4", "G5")))




Code
# Baseline ICI regimen from ici_type at the Early Treatment (Week 6–12) event.
# ici_regimen_class collapses the 11 types into 4 mechanism classes.
ici <- early_tx %>%
  transmute(
    record_id,
    baseline_ici_treatment = factor(
      ici_type, levels = 1:11,
      labels = c("Pembrolizumab", "Nivolumab", "Ipilimumab", "Relatlimab",
                 "Avelumab", "Durvalumab", "Atezolizumab",
                 "Nivolumab/Ipilimumab", "Nivolumab/Relatlimab",
                 "Other", "Not receiving ICI")),
    ici_regimen_class = factor(
      case_when(
        ici_type %in% c(1, 2, 5, 6, 7) ~ 1L,   # PD-(L)1 monotherapy
        ici_type %in% c(3, 8)          ~ 2L,   # CTLA-4–containing
        ici_type %in% c(4, 9)          ~ 3L,   # LAG-3–containing
        ici_type %in% c(10, 11)        ~ 4L    # Other / No active ICI
      ),
      levels = 1:4,
      labels = c("PD-(L)1 monotherapy", "CTLA-4–containing",
                 "LAG-3–containing", "Other/No active ICI"))
  )




Code
# Concomitant meds: six AIN-associated classes. Each free-text term is matched
# case-insensitively against con_med; a class is present if its structured
# REDCap field == 1 OR a term matches.
search_terms <- list(
  ppi = c("omeprazole","Prilosec","esomeprazole","Nexium","pantoprazole","Protonix",
          "lansoprazole","Prevacid","dexlansoprazole","Dexilant","rabeprazole","Aciphex"),
  antibiotic = c("amoxicillin","Augmentin","penicillin","ampicillin","dicloxacillin",
          "cephalexin","Keflex","cefazolin","ceftriaxone","Rocephin","cefepime",
          "cefpodoxime","cefdinir","ciprofloxacin","Cipro","levofloxacin","Levaquin",
          "moxifloxacin","Avelox","azithromycin","Zithromax","clarithromycin","Biaxin",
          "erythromycin","doxycycline","minocycline","tetracycline","clindamycin",
          "Cleocin","metronidazole","Flagyl","nitrofurantoin","Macrobid","fosfomycin",
          "Monurol","vancomycin","linezolid","Zyvox"),
  tmp_smx = c("trimethoprim-sulfamethoxazole","TMP-SMX","TMP/SMX","sulfamethoxazole",
          "cotrimoxazole","co-trimoxazole","Bactrim","Septra"),
  nsaid = c("ibuprofen","Advil","Motrin","naproxen","Aleve","diclofenac","Voltaren",
          "indomethacin","Indocin","meloxicam","Mobic","celecoxib","Celebrex",
          "ketorolac","Toradol","nabumetone","Relafen","sulindac","etodolac",
          "piroxicam","Feldene","oxaprozin","Daypro"),
  allopurinol = c("allopurinol","Zyloprim","Aloprim"),
  antiepileptic = c("carbamazepine","Tegretol","oxcarbazepine","Trileptal","phenytoin",
          "Dilantin","fosphenytoin","Cerebyx","lamotrigine","Lamictal","phenobarbital")
)

structured_field <- c(
  ppi           = "ppi",
  antibiotic    = "nephrotox_drugs___1",
  tmp_smx       = "nephrotox_drugs___2",
  nsaid         = "nephrotox_drugs___3",
  allopurinol   = "nephrotox_drugs___4",
  antiepileptic = "nephrotox_drugs___5"
)




Code
# Build a case-insensitive alternation regex per class (terms regex-escaped),
# then flag each class and AIN_con_med_any.
esc <- function(x) gsub("([][(){}.^$*+?\\\\|-])", "\\\\\\1", x)
class_regex <- map_chr(search_terms, ~ paste0(esc(.x), collapse = "|"))

con_text <- prebaseline$con_med %>% replace_na("")

med_flags <- imap_dfc(structured_field, function(field, cls) {
  structured <- if (field %in% names(prebaseline)) {
    replace_na(prebaseline[[field]] == 1, FALSE)
  } else FALSE
  freetext <- str_detect(con_text, regex(class_regex[[cls]], ignore_case = TRUE))
  tibble(!!cls := as.integer(structured | freetext))
})

medications <- bind_cols(record_id = prebaseline$record_id, med_flags) %>%
  mutate(AIN_con_med_any = as.integer(
    rowSums(across(all_of(names(structured_field)))) > 0))




RPDR








Variable
Type
Definition (RPDR value, anchored on REDCap fields)




baseline_hgb
continuous
RPDR hemoglobin (Group_Id = HGB) closest to the baseline visit, anchored on REDCap visit_date and joined via REDCap EMPI (±30 d; ties prefer prior)


baseline_albumin
continuous
RPDR albumin (Group_Id = ALB) closest to the baseline visit, anchored on REDCap visit_date and joined via REDCap EMPI (±30 d; ties prefer prior)




Requires an EMPI ↔︎ record_id crosswalk so RPDR (keyed by EMPI) can join to REDCap (keyed by record_id). This block is eval: false until the RPDR pull and crosswalk are available.



Code
# Closest-lab-to-date: smallest |day-diff| from the baseline visit; ties prefer
# the prior value (diff <= 0); anything > 30 days away is coded missing.
closest_lab <- function(lab_df, index_df, group_id, varname, window = 30) {
  lab_df %>%
    filter(Group_Id == group_id, grepl("^\\d+\\.?\\d*$", Result)) %>%
    mutate(Result = as.numeric(Result)) %>%
    inner_join(index_df, by = "EMPI") %>%
    mutate(diff = as.numeric(Seq_Date_Time - baseline_visit_date)) %>%
    filter(abs(diff) <= window) %>%
    arrange(EMPI, abs(diff), diff > 0) %>%
    distinct(EMPI, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    transmute(EMPI, !!varname := Result)
}

lab <- read.table(rpdr_lab_path, sep = "|", fill = TRUE, quote = "",
                  header = TRUE) %>%
  select(EMPI, Seq_Date_Time, Result, Group_Id)
lab$Seq_Date_Time <- as.Date(lab$Seq_Date_Time, "%m/%d/%Y")

index_df <- baseline %>%
  transmute(record_id, EMPI, baseline_visit_date = as.Date(visit_date)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(EMPI))

hgb <- closest_lab(lab, index_df, HGB_GROUP, "baseline_hgb")
alb <- closest_lab(lab, index_df, ALB_GROUP, "baseline_albumin")

rpdr_labs <- index_df %>%
  select(record_id, EMPI) %>%
  left_join(hgb, by = "EMPI") %>%
  left_join(alb, by = "EMPI") %>%
  select(record_id, baseline_hgb, baseline_albumin)




Code
# Assemble one row per participant and write aim2_master.rds. RPDR labs are
# attached only if that block was run (data available).
aim2_master <- demographics %>%
  left_join(comorbidities, by = "record_id") %>%
  left_join(autoimmune,    by = "record_id") %>%
  left_join(kidney,        by = "record_id") %>%
  left_join(ici,           by = "record_id") %>%
  left_join(medications,   by = "record_id")

if (exists("rpdr_labs")) {
  aim2_master <- aim2_master %>% left_join(rpdr_labs, by = "record_id")
}

saveRDS(aim2_master, "aim2_master.rds")
glimpse(aim2_master)

title: Aim 2 — Variable Creation
text:
4.1 Derived: Autoimmune history (autoimmune_history)
autoimmune_history = 1 if any pre-existing autoimmune comorbidity box is checked, else 0 (SAP §“Derived variable: Autoimmune history”).


Code
autoimmune_boxes <- c(
  "comorb_rheum___1", "comorb_rheum___3",
  "comorb_pulm___3",
  "comorb_cardiac___6",
  "comorb_gi___1", "comorb_gi___3", "comorb_gi___4", "comorb_gi___5", "comorb_gi___8",
  "comorb_derm___1", "comorb_derm___2", "comorb_derm___3", "comorb_derm___4",
  "comorb_neuro___1", "comorb_neuro___2",
  "comorb_endocrine___2", "comorb_endocrine___3",
  "comorb_heme___1"
)

autoimmune <- prebaseline %>%
  transmute(record_id,
            autoimmune_history = any_box(prebaseline, autoimmune_boxes))

title: Aim 2 — Melanoma · ICI · Acute Interstitial Nephritis
text:
Project Overview
Aim 2 examines acute interstitial nephritis (AIN) in melanoma patients treated with immune checkpoint inhibitors (ICI), with its own longitudinal REDCap project and Statistical Analysis Plan (Tianqi_SAP.docx).


Study Arms



Arm
Definition




1
Metastatic melanoma receiving ICI


2
Adjuvant stage II–III melanoma receiving ICI


3
Control: stage I–IIIA melanoma not receiving ICI





Data Sources







Source
Role




Longitudinal REDCap export
Demographics, comorbidities, ICI regimen, concomitant medications, baseline eGFR


RPDR laboratory pull
Baseline hemoglobin & albumin (closest result to baseline visit)



REDCap events: prebaseline_arm_1 (demographics, comorbidities, meds), baseline_arm_1 (eGFR, visit date), early_treatment_we_arm_1 (ICI regimen).


Key Derived Variables

autoimmune_history — any of 18 pre-existing autoimmune comorbidity boxes
baseline_ckd_stage / baseline_ckd_binary — KDIGO categories of baseline eGFR (binary <60)
baseline_ici_treatment / ici_regimen_class — ICI regimen and its 4-level mechanism class
AIN_con_med_any — exposure to any of 6 AIN-associated medication classes (structured field or con_med free-text)
baseline_hgb / baseline_albumin — RPDR labs closest to the baseline visit (±30 days)

See Variable Creation for the full SAP-specified derivation logic.
